Operation 'listProjects' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description is vague about what 'various criteria' means and doesn't specify the return format. Added clarity about filter types, explicit mention of ProjectsMap return type, and pagination behavior to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Retrieve up to 200 projects, optionally filtered by various criteria.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve up to 200 projects from the repository database, optionally filtered by criteria such as repository, package status, or other search parameters. Returns a ProjectsMap object containing project names mapped to their associated packages. Supports pagination and filtering to help AI agents narrow results.
data.reasoning: Description is vague about what 'various criteria' means and doesn't specify the return format. Added clarity about filter types, explicit mention of ProjectsMap return type, and pagination behavior to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'listProjectsFromName' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_input_details. Missing details about return format (ProjectsMap) and the ordering/pagination behavior. Added explicit mention of alphabetical ordering and use case for pagination to help AI agents understand when to use this operation versus the general listProjects endpoint.

data.current_summary: List projects starting from a name
data.current_description: Retrieve up to 200 projects starting from the specified name (inclusive). Supports the same query filters as the projects list endpoint.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve up to 200 projects starting from the specified project name (inclusive), ordered alphabetically. Supports the same query filters as the projects list endpoint. Returns a ProjectsMap object containing project names and their associated packages. Useful for paginating through large project datasets.
data.reasoning: Missing details about return format (ProjectsMap) and the ordering/pagination behavior. Added explicit mention of alphabetical ordering and use case for pagination to help AI agents understand when to use this operation versus the general listProjects endpoint.

message: Operation 'listProjectsUntilName' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description lacks context about ordering, return format, and use cases. Added details about alphabetical ordering, explicit mention of ProjectsMap return type, and clarified the pagination use case to improve AI agent understanding of when to use this endpoint.

data.current_summary: List projects ending at a name
data.current_description: Retrieve up to 200 projects ending at the specified name (inclusive).
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve up to 200 projects up to and including the specified project name, ordered alphabetically in reverse. Returns a ProjectsMap object containing project names and their associated packages. Useful for paginating backwards through the project dataset or retrieving projects within a specific alphabetical range.
data.reasoning: Description lacks context about ordering, return format, and use cases. Added details about alphabetical ordering, explicit mention of ProjectsMap return type, and clarified the pagination use case to improve AI agent understanding of when to use this endpoint.

message: Operation 'getRepositoryProblems' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Description is too generic about what 'problems' means and doesn't specify the return format. Added clarity about the types of problems (package inconsistencies, version conflicts), explicit mention of Problem object array return type, and use cases to help AI agents understand the operation's purpose.

data.current_description: Retrieve the list of problems found in a specific repository.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve all problems detected in a specific repository. Returns an array of Problem objects containing details about package inconsistencies, version conflicts, or other repository issues. Useful for monitoring repository health and identifying maintenance issues.
data.reasoning: Description is too generic about what 'problems' means and doesn't specify the return format. Added clarity about the types of problems (package inconsistencies, version conflicts), explicit mention of Problem object array return type, and use cases to help AI agents understand the operation's purpose.

message: Operation 'getMaintainerProblemsForRepo' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Description lacks clarity about what 'problems' means in this context and doesn't specify the return format or filtering behavior. Added explicit mention of Problem object array return type, clarified that results are filtered by both maintainer and repository, and provided use case context for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_summary: Get maintainer problems for a repository
data.current_description: Retrieve problems for a specific maintainer in a given repository.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve all problems associated with a specific maintainer's packages in a given repository. Returns an array of Problem objects filtered by the specified maintainer and repository. Useful for identifying maintenance issues specific to a maintainer or repository combination.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about what 'problems' means in this context and doesn't specify the return format or filtering behavior. Added explicit mention of Problem object array return type, clarified that results are filtered by both maintainer and repository, and provided use case context for AI agent decision-making.
